description_long: This is a compact, submachine gun-style rifle with a matte black finish and a boxy, utilitarian design. The upper receiver features a perforated barrel shroud with multiple circular vents for heat dissipation, and the barrel itself is short, ending flush with the shroud. The grip is ergonomic and made of a polymer material, with a prominent trigger guard and a straight magazine well that houses a long, detachable box magazine. The top of the receiver has a simple iron sight, and the rear of the weapon is flat, lacking a traditional rifle stock. The overall construction appears robust, with most components made from metal and reinforced polymer, suitable for close-quarters urban environments.
description: A compact, black submachine gun-style rifle with a perforated barrel shroud, long box magazine, and ergonomic polymer grip. It features a short barrel, iron sights, and lacks a traditional stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, perforated barrel shroud, long magazine, and ergonomic grip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening, perforated shroud, and the narrow profile of the magazine and grip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the magazine and grip contours.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the receiver, the top iron sight, and the alignment of the magazine and grip.
